product_overview: A concise PRD describing the admin-side forms and flows to test across the frontend (login, products, categories, settings). Focus is on happy-path and error-path verification for CRUD and auth functionality.
core_goals: Verify admin authentication and access control for the admin dashboard.
Validate create, read, update, and delete flows for products and categories.
Ensure settings form saves and validates store configuration correctly.
Provide clear, repeatable user flows (happy and error paths) for automated/manual testing of all forms.

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Allow administrators to authenticate using credentials and reach the admin dashboard; show errors for invalid credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirect to /admin -> See admin dashboard overview
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field (invalid) -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Remain on /admin/login

features.name: Admin Products Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, and delete products from the admin products page using the product form and list UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/products -> Click Add Product -> Fill out product form fields (name, description, price, etc.) -> Submit form to save product -> See new product listed in products table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click Add Product -> Leave required product field blank -> Submit form to save product -> See validation error message -> Remain on product form
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click Edit Product for an existing product -> Fill out product form fields with updated values -> Submit form to save product -> See updated product in products table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click delete to remove a product -> Confirm deletion -> See product removed from products table
Navigate to /admin/products -> Click delete to remove a product -> Confirm deletion -> Server returns error -> See deletion error message -> Product remains listed in products table

features.name: Admin Categories Management
features.description: Manage product categories: add, edit, view, and delete categories using the category form and list UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click Add Category -> Fill out category name and description -> Submit form to save category -> See new category listed in categories table
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click Add Category -> Leave category name blank -> Submit form to save category -> See validation error message -> Remain on category form
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click Edit Category for an existing category -> Update category name and/or description -> Submit form to save category -> See updated category in categories table
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click delete to remove a category -> Confirm deletion -> See category removed from categories table
Navigate to /admin/categories -> Click delete to remove a category -> Confirm deletion -> Server returns error -> See deletion error message -> Category remains listed in categories table

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Edit and persist store settings (store name, currency, contact email, etc.) via the settings form and provide validation and save feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> Update store name, currency, contact email, etc. -> Submit form to save settings -> See settings saved confirmation or success message
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Enter invalid contact email -> Submit form to save settings -> See validation error message for email -> Remain on /admin/settings
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Update multiple settings fields -> Submit form to save settings -> Server returns error -> See save failure message -> Changes not persisted

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Login with credentials to access admin dashboard
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials or redirect on success

features.name: Admin Products Management
user_interactions: Click Add Product or Edit Product
Fill out product form fields (name, description, price, etc.)
Click delete to remove a product

features.name: Admin Categories Management
user_interactions: Click Add Category or Edit Category
Fill out category name and description
Click delete to remove a category

features.name: Admin Settings
user_interactions: Update store name, currency, contact email, etc.
